zh.Kenton, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可簡頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Halse於1471年出生在英國戴文簡頓時，他的父親Richard Hals32歲，母親Margery Latimer29歲。他於大約1491年與Margaret Morton在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1559年在英國戴文享年88歲。

zh-hans.Kenton, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可簡頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Halse于1471年出生在英国戴文簡頓时，他的父亲Richard Hals32岁，母亲Margery Latimer29岁。他于大约1491年与Margaret Morton在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1559年在英国戴文享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Halse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name denoting someone living on a neck of land (from Middle English atte halse ‘at the neck’), or a habitational name from either of two places in Devon and Somerset named Halse, from this word.
English: from Middle English hals ‘neck’ (Old English heals), denoting someone with a distinctive neck.

Norwegian: habitational name from any of the three farmsteads in the county of Møre og Romsdal. The farmsteads are so named from the Old Norse dative singular of hals ‘neck’, referring to a neck of land, or a ridge between two valleys.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Halse was born in 1471, in Kenton, Devon, England, his father, Richard Hals, was 32 and his mother, Margery Latimer, was 29. He married Margaret Morton about 1491, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1559, in Devon, England, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Halse est né en 1471, à Kenton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Hals, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margery Latimer, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Morton environ 1491, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1559, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Halse 1471 in Kenton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Hals 32 und seine Mutter Margery Latimer 29. Er hat um 1491 in England, United Kingdom Margaret Morton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1559 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Halse è nato il nel 1471 nel Kenton, Devon, England, il suo padre, Richard Hals, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margery Latimer, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Morton circa 1491, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1559, nel Devon, England, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Halseが1471年にイギリスデボンケントンで生まれた時，父Richard Halsは32歳，母Margery Latimerは29歳であった。約1491年にイギリスイギリスでMargaret Mortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1559年にイギリスデボンで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Halse(이)가 1471년 영국 데폰 켄턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Hals(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Latimer(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1491년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Morton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1559년 영국 데폰에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Halse nasceu em 1471, em Kenton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Hals, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margery Latimer, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Morton aproximadamente 1491, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1559, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Halse родился в 1471 г. в местности кэнтон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Hals было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Latimer, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Morton около 1491 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1559 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Halse nació en 1471, en Kenton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Hals, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margery Latimer, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret Morton aproximadamente 1491, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1559, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años.
